briefdescription.para: Dali::Accessibility::Internal::BitReference.
Dali::Accessibility::Internal::BitReference::ElementType.
Dali::Accessibility::Internal::BitReference::IndexType.
An array of N integers that can store 32*N bits.
Constructor.
Constructs a new BitSet with all bits inialized with values from the specified array.
Constructs a new BitSet with all bits inialized with values from the specified array.
Constructs a new BitSet with all bits initialized with bits from the specified integer.

detaileddescription.para: This constructor is only available for BitSets with 32-bit capacity. Equivalent to the pseudocode: for(i=0;i<32;++i)bits[i]=(data>>i)&0x1;

briefdescription.para: Constructs a new BitSet with all bits initialized with bits from the specified integer.

detaileddescription.para: This constructor is only available for BitSets with 64-bit capacity. Equivalent to the pseudocode: for(i=0;i<64;++i)bits[i]=(data>>i)&0x1;

briefdescription.para: Checks whether any bits are set to 1.

simplesect.para: true if at least one bit is set to 1, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Compares two bitsets for equality.

simplesect.para: true if all bits in the two bitsets have the same values, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Compares two bitsets for inequality.

simplesect.para: false if all bits in the two bitsets have the same values, true otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Computes the bitwise NOT of this bitset.

simplesect.para: Result of the bitwise NOT operation.

briefdescription.para: Computes the bitwise OR of two bitsets.

simplesect.para: Result of the bitwise OR operation.

briefdescription.para: Computes the bitwise AND of two bitsets.

simplesect.para: Result of the bitwise AND operation.

briefdescription.para: Computes the bitwise XOR of two bitsets.

simplesect.para: Result of the bitwise XOR operation.

briefdescription.para: Queries the value of the specified bit.

detaileddescription.para: This operator is used in expressions like boolb=bitset[i];

parameterdescription.para: Index of the bit to query.

simplesect.para: true if the specified bit is set to 1, false if it is set to 0.

briefdescription.para: Obtains a writable reference to the specified bit.

detaileddescription.para: This operator is used in expressions like bitset[i]=true;

parameterdescription.para: Index of the bit to query.

simplesect.para: A writable reference to the specified bit.

briefdescription.para: Obtains a copy of the internal storage.

simplesect.para: A copy of the internal storage.

briefdescription.para: Obtains a copy of the internal storage serialized as a single integer.

detaileddescription.para: This method is only available for BitSets with 32-bit capacity.

simplesect.para: A copy of the internal storage.

briefdescription.para: Obtains a copy of the internal storage serialized as a single integer.

detaileddescription.para: This method is only available for BitSets with 64-bit capacity.

simplesect.para: A copy of the internal storage.

briefdescription.para: A collection of bits stored in 32-bit chunks for convenient serialization.

parameterdescription.para: Number of 32-bit chunks (the capacity of this BitSet is 32*N).
